title: LSQWRF130/C Cooling Capacity
summary: Cooling capacity of LSQWRF130/C is 130 kW.
evidence_quote:
型号   LSQWRF130/C  LSQWRF186/C  LSQWRF240/C  LSQWRF316/C
制冷量 Kw 130 186 240 305

title: E01 Flow Switch Fault
summary: E01 indicates flow switch fault. Host detects flow switch signal OFF for 6s after pump runs 30s. All modules stop. Non-recoverable; requires power cycle.

structured_payload.condition: 主机检测，水泵开启30s后连续6s测量流量开关信号为“OFF”
structured_payload.recovery: 不可恢复故障，必须断电排除故障后重新启动

evidence_quote:
E01  流量开关故障
判断条件：主机检测，水泵开启30s后连续6s测量流量开关信号为  “OFF”；
故障处理：停所有模块；
故障恢复：该故障为不可恢复故障，必须断电排除故障后重新启动。

title: E05 Phase Loss Protection
summary: E05 indicates three-phase input phase loss. Stops all compressors, pumps, fans. Auto-recovery when input normal.

structured_payload.description: 三相交流电输入缺相保护
structured_payload.action: 停所有压缩机、水泵、风机
structured_payload.recovery: 交流电输入正常后，自动恢复

evidence_quote:
E05   三相交流电输入缺相保护
判断条件：三相交流电输入缺相；
故障处理：停所有压缩机、水泵、风机（若主机出现此故障，停所有模块，从机出现此故障，则只停对应模块机）；
故障恢复：交流电输入正常后，自动恢复。

title: E06 Phase Sequence Protection
summary: E06 indicates three-phase input phase sequence error. Stops all compressors, pumps, fans. Recovery after power off and phase adjustment.

structured_payload.description: 三相交流电输入相序保护
structured_payload.condition: 三相交流电输入相序错误
structured_payload.action: 停所有压缩机、水泵、风机

evidence_quote:
E06    三相交流电输入相序保护
判断条件：三相交流电输入相序错误；
故障处理 ：停所有压缩机、水泵、风机（若主机出现此故障，停所有模块，从机出现此故障，则只停对应模块机）；
故障恢复：断电调整相序后恢复。

title: E07 Return Water Temperature Sensor Fault
summary: E07 indicates return water temperature sensor open/short or Tr≥85°C or Tr<-1°C. Stops all compressors and pumps if host; no action if slave.

structured_payload.condition: 回水温度传感器开路或短路，或Tr≥85℃或Tr＜-1℃
structured_payload.action: 停所有压缩机、水泵（若主机出现此故障，停所有模块，从机出现此故障，则不作停机保护）

evidence_quote:
E07   回水温度传感器故障
判断条件：回水温度传感器开路或短路，或Tr≥85℃或Tr＜-1℃；
故障处理：停所有压缩机、水泵（若主机出现此故障，停所有模块，从机出现此故障，则不作停机保护）；
故障恢复：更换温传正常后恢复。

title: E08 Outlet Water Temperature Sensor Fault
summary: E08 indicates outlet water temperature sensor open/short or To≥85°C or To<0°C (To<-3°C when flow switch closed). Stops all compressors of the unit.

structured_payload.condition: 出水温度传感器开路或短路，或To≥85℃或To＜0℃（流量开关闭合时To＜-3℃才报故障）
structured_payload.action: 停本机组的所有压缩机

evidence_quote:
E08   出水温度传感器故障
判断条件：出水温度传感器开路或短路，或To≥85℃或To＜0℃（流量开关闭合时To＜-3℃才报故障）；
故障处理：停本机组的所有压缩机；
故障恢复：更换温传正常后恢复。

title: E09 Outdoor Ambient Temperature Sensor Fault
summary: E09 indicates outdoor ambient temperature sensor open/short. Stops all compressors and fans of the unit.

structured_payload.description: 室外环境温度传感器故障
structured_payload.condition: 室外环境温度传感器开路或短路
structured_payload.action: 停本机组的所有压缩机和风机

evidence_quote:
E09  室外环境温度传感器故障
判断条件：室外环境温度传感器开路或短路；
故障处理：停本机组的所有压缩机和风机；
故障恢复：更换温传正常后恢复。

title: E22 A System High Pressure Protection
summary: E22 indicates A system high pressure switch HP1 open. Stops A system compressor. Auto-recovery when HP1 closes.

structured_payload.condition: A系统高压开关HP1处于断开状态

evidence_quote:
E22     A 系统高压保护
判断条件： A系统高压开关HP1处于断开状态；
故障处理：停A系统压缩机 ；
故障恢复： HP1信号闭合后恢复。

title: E23 A System Low Pressure Protection
summary: E23 indicates A system low pressure switch LP1 open (not detected during defrost and first 7 min of compressor start). Stops A system compressor. Auto-recovery when LP1 closes.

structured_payload.condition: A系统低压开关LP1处于断开状态（除霜及压机启动7min内不检测）

evidence_quote:
E23     A系统低压保护
判断条件： A系统低压开关LP1处于断开状态（除霜及压机启动7min内不检测）；
故障处理：停A系统压缩机；
故障恢复：信号闭合后恢复。

title: E24 Compressor 1 Overcurrent Protection
summary: E24 indicates compressor 1 overcurrent (IAC1≥17.5A, or ≥30.0A for 240 model). Stops A system compressor. Auto-recovery.
evidence_quote:
E24  压机1过电流保护
判断条件： I AC 1≥17.5A；
故障处理：停A系统压机；
故障恢复：自恢复。
对于240机型判断条件为： I AC 1≥30.0A；
